name: LG_UPDATEMRPITMCHNG_001
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDATEMRPITMCHNG_001
       @itemRef   INT,
       @vrntRef   INT,
       @parentRef INT
       AS
DECLARE @newLogicalRef INT
DECLARE @CHK           SMALLINT
DECLARE @MRPVAL        VARCHAR(101)
DECLARE @FRMNR        SMALLINT
SELECT  @CHK  = 0
SELECT  @FRMNR =CAST('001' AS SMALLINT)
SELECT @MRPVAL = VALUE FROM "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
WHERE FIRMNR = @FRMNR AND CODE='PLN_MRPNETCHANGE'
IF (LTRIM(@MRPVAL) = '1') AND
   EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_NTLCK_001  WHERE (LOCKSTR = '001-' +
   LTRIM(CAST(CAST('01' AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR)) +'-SERV-1' ))
  BEGIN
       SELECT @CHK = 1
  END
IF (@CHK <> 1 ) AND (LTRIM(@MRPVAL) = '1')
 BEGIN
      IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_001_MRPITEMCHG
                    WHERE (ITEMREF = @itemRef) AND (VARIANTREF = @vrntRef) AND (PARITEMREF = @parentRef))
          BEGIN
                 --EXECUTE LREF_LG_001_MRPITEMCHG @newLogicalRef OUTPUT
                 INSERT INTO LG_001_MRPITEMCHG
                      (ITEMREF, VARIANTREF, PARITEMREF)
                 VALUES
                       (@itemRef,@vrntRef,@parentRef)
          END
 END
